title: Create Adventures!
description: Vanilla Plus + Create! What wonders can you make?
body:
**WELCOME TO CREATE ADVENTURES**

This is a Create modpack, with alot of addons! So you can have fun, building and automating resources! It is Create 6.0, so you can have a blast with the postage update!

The rest of the modpack is more Vanilla+ orientated, to not dwindle from the main mod in the modpack! The areas of Minecraft that have been editied/tweaked are:

- Overworld Generation
- Nether Generation
- End Generation
- Fishing
- Villagers
- Farming

Have fun with the modpack, and make sure to show love and support to all the people that make these mods, because this wouldn't even be possible without the glorious work! :D
